{
  "claims": [
    "AB-1089 seeks to regulate three dimensional printing and CNC milling of firearms on the state level.",
    "AB-1089 would require anybody who uses a three dimensional printer or CNC milling machine to manufacture a firearm to be a state-licensed manufacturer.",
    "AB-1089 would prohibit the sale, purchase, possession, or receipt of a three dimensional printer or CNC milling machine intended for manufacturing firearms, except by state-licensed manufacturers.",
